have hx : (x - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1)

        have denom_pos : (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity

have hx : (x - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1)
  have hy : (y - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1)
  have hz : (z - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2)
